articles.title: US Futures Waver as Oil Drops on Iran Hope; SpaceX Extends Gains
articles.summary: US stocks held steady at the open on Tuesday as rising confidence about a US-Iran agreement sent oil prices lower. SpaceX extended gains, as broad market sentiment remained strong.

articles.title: Marvell Needs Lots of Growth to Achieve Huang’s $1 Trillion Call
articles.summary: Jensen Huang may see Marvell Technology Inc. as the stock market’s “next trillion-dollar company,” but it’s going to take a lot of growth for the chipmaker to even sniff that lofty level.

articles.title: SpaceX Set to Overtake Amazon in Value as It Soars for Third Day
articles.summary: SpaceX shares jumped on Tuesday, putting the firm on track to overtake Amazon.com Inc. as the fifth largest publicly traded company in the world just days after its blockbuster debut.

articles.title: S&P 500 Rally Wavers Before Fed as SpaceX Jumps: Markets Wrap
articles.summary: A rally that sent stocks to the brink of all-time highs wavered on the eve of the first Federal Reserve rate decision under Kevin Warsh, with a another slide in oil prices driving bond yields lower.

articles.title: Former De Beers CEO Penny Is Said to Lead Race for Diamond Giant

articles.title: Oil Falls Below $80 With US-Iran Deal Set to Add Wave of Supply

articles.title: World Cup Exposes Growing Global Rift Over Prediction Markets
articles.summary: This year’s World Cup is the first since prediction markets like Kalshi and Polymarket exploded to popularity as a new way to bet on sports.

articles.title: Germany Rejects UniCredit’s Commerzbank Bid on Last Day
articles.summary: Germany renewed its staunch opposition to UniCredit SpA’s proposed €39 billion ($45 billion) takeover of Commerzbank AG on the final day of the formal acceptance period.

articles.title: Bitcoin doesn't need Ethereum-style yield, says Strategy's Michael Saylor
articles.summary: Michael Saylor says Bitcoin does not need staking or inflation, outlining a five-layer “Digital Asset Stack” that generates returns through credit and equity products built around BTC.

articles.title: Bitcoin miner IREN enters Europe with Nostrum acquisition as AI pivot accelerates

articles.title: Bitcoin recovery rests on US-Iran deal as momentum remains weak

articles.title: US government watchdog urges FDIC to coordinate on crypto oversight
